symptomChecker.selectPetFirst: Please select which pet has these symptoms.

symptomChecker.disclaimer: This is AI-assisted triage only and is not a medical diagnosis. Always consult a licensed veterinarian.

birthday.notification_body: Today is {{name}}'s special day. Give them some extra love! 🐾
birthday.turns_one: {{name}} turns 1! Great time to schedule a general wellness check.
birthday.senior: {{name}} enters senior years at 7. Consider a senior wellness panel with your vet.
birthday.ten_years: {{name}} is 10! Biannual vet visits are recommended for pets this age.
